untranslatable_reason: Signal requires options-specific logic (vertical call spreads, strike selection based on moneyness, delta/vega comparison, theoretical edge calculation) that cannot be expressed using equity price/technical indicators alone. The core hedging mechanics (selling ATM/ITM calls, buying OTM/ATM calls, comparing volatility sensitivity between legs) require options pricing models and greeks not available in the indicator set. IV level thresholds (HIGH vs LOW) can be approximated with india_vix, but the actual spread construction and edge verification logic is untranslatable.
translation_notes: This is an options strategy signal that requires derivatives pricing and risk management logic. Only a proxy entry based on IV regime (india_vix) has been provided. The actual signal logic—selecting strikes based on ATM/ITM/OTM relative to current price, constructing spreads with specific delta/vega profiles, and validating theoretical edge—cannot be implemented in a price-action backtest engine. Recommend: (1) use dedicated options backtester, or (2) define explicit IV thresholds and price level rules to translate into this framework.
